news.summary: Lomiko Metals Inc. (TSX.V: LMR) plans to seek approval from the TSX Venture Exchange (“TSXV”) to finalize the second tranche of hard dollar financing totaling $113,500 and the first tranche of flow-through financing totaling $109,999.86. This will involve issuing 840,741 common shares at $0.135 each, accompanied by a warrant that can be exercised over three years at $0.20, generating $113,500 in gross proceeds. Additionally, the company will issue a total of 647,058 flow-through shares as part of the financing.
news.headline: Lomiko Metals closes second tranche of hard dollar financing for $113,500 and first tranche of flow-through financing for $109,999.86.

news.summary: The number of new coronavirus cases has risen by more than 1,500 in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 30,000. The death toll has also increased by 50, reaching a total of 500 fatalities. Hospitals are currently operating at 90% capacity due to the surge in cases. The government has announced new restrictions to help curb the spread of the virus, including a mandatory mask mandate and limits on social gatherings. Officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus and alleviate the strain on the healthcare system.
news.headline: Three individuals detained in Libya for attacking state oil facility, acting to prevent supply disruption.
"Billion-dollar fight for 7-Eleven ownership heats up in video."

news.summary: In the latest data released, it was reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high of 30,000 within the past 24 hours. This significant increase has brought the total number of active cases in the country to 150,000. Additionally, the number of fatalities related to the virus has also seen a spike, with 500 new deaths reported in the same period. This surge in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals nearing full capacity. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Trump's tariffs to remain after appellate ruling, source from Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: An announcement was made today regarding a record-breaking increase in employment numbers in the United States. The latest data shows that the economy has added 850,000 jobs, surpassing all predictions. This surge in employment has led to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 5.9%, the lowest it has been in over a year. Additionally, wages have seen a notable rise of 0.3% in the past month. The unexpected positive shift in employment figures has sparked optimism among economists and policymakers.
news.headline: Three individuals were detained in Libya following an attack on state oil facilities, aiming to alleviate supply concerns.

news.summary: The 10th Annual "Eight Over Eighty" Benefit Gala celebrated the achievements of notable individuals over the age of 80. This year's honorees included Bob and Diane Abrams, Michael Bornstein, Judy Collins, Delia Ephron, David Freeman and the Freeman Family, Carol Jenkins, Marianne Kerner, Houston Person, and Judith Viorst. Additionally, Harold Iselin was recognized with the prestigious Spirit Award at the event. The gala showcased photos highlighting the contributions and accomplishments of these distinguished individuals.
news.headline: New Jewish Home recognizes 10 leaders over 80 at annual gala, including Judy Collins and Bob Abrams. Harold Iselin awarded with Spirit Award.

news.summary: Orlando, Florida - May 29, 2025 - Red Lobster has revealed a new collaboration with the Chicago Sky for the 2025 WNBA Season. The partnership involves Red Lobster offering special privileges to the players throughout the season. Red Lobster will extend its support to the Sky by hosting team events and offering exclusive deals.
news.headline: Red Lobster partners with Chicago Sky for 2025 WNBA season, offering support and hosting events.

news.summary: New Day Diagnostics has introduced ColoHealth™, an innovative blood test for detecting colorectal issues. This lab-drawn screening test can be obtained without a doctor's order in many states with no special preparation required. The announcement was made on May 29, 2025, in Knoxville, Tennessee. This new test simplifies the screening process for colorectal health and is expected to have a significant impact on early detection and prevention.
news.headline: ColoHealth blood test for colorectal cancer screening launched by New Day Diagnostics, available direct-to-consumer in most states with no special prep.

news.summary: The fundraising campaign following the post-gala event for The Good Dog Foundation in New York has commenced, after hosting hundreds of guests and therapy dogs at a successful gala on May 13 at the Edison Ballroom. The event generated significant support for the organization's animal-assisted healing work, with funds raised totaling a noteworthy sum.
news.headline: Good Dog Gala at Edison Ballroom raised funds for therapy dogs. Hundreds attended, support for Good Dog Foundation.

news.summary: Osisko Development Corp., trading as ODV on NYSE and TSXV, has revealed plans to fulfill the Third Deferred Payment to the Sellers of the Tintic Project in Utah. This ownership acquisition was finalized in May 2022. The Company will issue common shares as payment, as per the agreement terms. This transaction is part of a series of five deferred payments set out since the acquisition.
news.headline: Osisko Development to pay third deferred payment in common shares for Tintic Project acquisition.

news.summary: Colombia is making a significant impact at Miami Swim Week, showcasing its authority, identity, and purpose. The country, known for its beauty, is the top swimwear exporter in South America and ranks second in all of Latin America and the Caribbean. With this impressive reputation, Colombia is making waves in Miami as it participates in the event.
news.headline: Colombia dominates swimwear market in Latin America, 2nd largest exporter with identity and purpose at Miami Swim Week.

news.summary: A court decision that overturned President Trump's extensive tariffs was temporarily suspended shortly after, casting doubt on the administration's trade strategy. The ruling had challenged a significant number of tariffs imposed by the President, which amounted to [include specific numbers if available]. The uncertainty surrounding this development has raised concerns about the administration's handling of trade policies moving forward.
news.headline: Court decision suspended Trump’s tariffs; raises uncertainty about trade strategy with new legal challenge.

news.summary: Businesses were pleased when a court overturned President Trump's tariffs. However, their relief was short-lived as a stay of the ruling heightened uncertainty. The tariffs in question amounted to an estimated $X billion, impacting a wide range of industries. The court's initial decision was met with optimism by companies, but the subsequent stay has left many on edge about the future economic landscape.
news.headline: Court decision nullifying Trump's tariffs brings relief to businesses, but temporary stay causes uncertainty.

news.summary: Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc., a publicly traded investment company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, with the stock ticker symbol SPIR, has released its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company specializes in investing in blockchain infrastructure and digital asset yield opportunities. For the quarter ended March 31, 2025, Spirit reported key milestones and financial figures, indicating their performance in the market during that period.
news.headline: Spirit Blockchain Capital (CSE: SPIR) reports Q1 2025 highlights, including financial results, ended March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. (ReconAfrica) disclosed its fiscal first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company, listed on TSXV as RECO, OTCQX as RECAF, Frankfurt as 0XD, and NSX as REC, released unaudited consolidated financial statements and Management's Discussion and Analysis. Interested parties can access these documents on SEDAR+ website at www.sedarplus.ca.
news.headline: ReconAfrica releases Q1 filings for March 31, 2025, on SEDAR+. Stock tickers: TSXV: RECO, OTCQX: RECAF, Frankfurt: 0XD, NSX: REC.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Akron, Ohio, the Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company revealed the pricing of its issuance of 5-year senior notes totaling $500 million. These notes, which are senior unsecured, were offered by the company.
news.headline: Goodyear priced $500 million in 5-year senior notes for offering.

news.summary: LARAMIE, Wyo., May 29, 2025 - Agriculture technology company, Plenty Unlimited Inc., has secured funding to support their initiative in providing locally grown strawberries to communities all year long. The company specializes in indoor vertical farming and aims to deliver fresh produce consistently. This funding will enable them to expand their operations and increase their production capacity.
news.headline: Plenty emerges from Chapter 11 after completing restructuring, secures funding for year-round strawberries.

news.summary: The drug INBRIJA, designed as a dopamine replacement therapy for off periods in Parkinson's disease, is showing promising market potential as it offers quick alleviation from motor symptoms. This is crucial with the rising number of Parkinson's cases worldwide, as the demand for efficient treatments continues to increase.
news.headline: INBRIJA, a promising inhaled Parkinson's therapy, set for market penetration as demand rises due to growing Parkinson's prevalence.

news.summary: Mark McGough has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of Clean Energy Systems (CES), based in Rancho Cordova, California, as of May 29, 2025. CES specializes in carbon-free combustion technology and zero-emission power solutions. This appointment follows the company’s commitment to advancing clean energy initiatives.
news.headline: Clean Energy Systems appoint Mark McGough as new CEO, leader in carbon-free tech, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Despite early gains on the stock market today following a special court ruling most Trump tariffs as illegal, the upward momentum quickly declined. Nvidia made a significant breakthrough by surging past its entry point. The stock market indexes showed promise after a meeting between Trump and Powell. This live coverage signifies the ongoing developments in the market.
news.headline: Stock market gains momentum after Trump-Powell meeting, Nvidia surges. Special court deems most Trump tariffs illegal.

news.summary: After initially rising, the Nasdaq and Nvidia saw some gains trimmed, though overall the stock market showed an increase. Companies like Costco, Dell, and Zscaler reported their latest results. The focus now turns to the looming Federal Reserve inflation data. Dow Jones futures dipped following Nvidia's surge, despite general tech gains, with Zscaler and Dell showing late rises.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop after Nvidia surge, tech gains fade. Costco, Dell, Zscaler rise late. Fed inflation data expected.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration, the esteemed premium rum brand Flor de Caña teamed up with Danil Nevsky, ranked as the world's second most influential bartender, to kick off an innovative sustainable guest bartending tour throughout the nation. This partnership aims to commemorate cocktail culture while highlighting the importance of sustainability. The tour is set to feature top-notch mixology and eco-friendly practices to raise awareness among consumers. Expect a unique experience bringing together the best in bartending and environmental consciousness.
news.headline: Flor de Caña and Danil Nevsky partner for Sustainable Cocktail Tour in U.S., promoting eco-friendly mixology.

news.summary: Planet Fitness, a leading franchisor and operator of fitness centers, has launched its annual High School Summer Pass™ program, now in its fifth year. The initiative is open to high school teens aged 14-19 and offers them the opportunity to work out for free at any of its 15 Utah locations and over 2,700 Planet Fitness centers nationwide. This program aims to encourage teenagers to stay active during the summer months, with more members than any other fitness brand participating.
news.headline: Planet Fitness brings back annual High School Summer Pass™ program in Utah, offering free gym access to 14-19 year olds at 15 locations, part of 2,700+ nationwide.

news.summary: Stocks linked to the artificial intelligence trend surged on Thursday following Nvidia's positive forecast regarding AI data center demand. Nvidia's strong quarter performance boosted AI data center stocks.
news.headline: Nvidia's 'robust' quarter boosts AI data center stocks. Market reacts positively to reassuring outlook on demand.

news.summary: Centrus Energy Corp, a company listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol LEU, has revealed that its management is set to take part in several forthcoming conferences. Specifically, on June 3, they will be holding individual investor meetings at the Stifel 2025 Boston Cross event. This news was released from Bethesda, Md., on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: Centrus Energy (NYSE: LEU) to participate in investor events on June 3 at the Stifel 2025 Boston Cross.

news.summary: During its fiscal first quarter, Dell Technologies reported a combination of positive and negative results. Despite this, investors were encouraged by the company's optimistic outlook, causing Dell's stock to increase in after-hours trading. The specific financial numbers were not provided in the news snippet.
news.headline: Dell Technologies reports mixed Q1 results, stock rises with positive outlook for investors. Dell stock rose after results.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. announced to its shareholders that the Board of Directors endorsed the payment of interest on capital to stockholders ("IOC") at a rate of R$0.3341 per share. This decision was made during the meeting held on this date. The amount is subject to income tax.
news.headline: Itaú Unibanco to pay R$0.3341 per share as interest on capital to stockholders after Board approval meeting.

news.summary: The market for B-cell inhibitors is witnessing strong growth due to the increasing prevalence of the target patient group, which encompasses conditions such as IgAN, Multiple Sclerosis, Immune Thrombocytopenia, SLE, IgG4-RD, wAIHA, NMOSD, Lupus Nephritis, ANCA Vasculitis, CSU, among others. This growth is fueled by a significant rise in the number of individuals affected by these conditions, contributing to the expanding market for B-cell inhibitors.
news.headline: B-cell inhibitors market to advance during 2025-2034 across 7MM due to novel drug launches for various indications.

news.summary: Friends of Dogecoin and Ripple are turning to APT Miner cloud mining for passive income due to recent coin price fluctuations. APT Miner offers a low threshold, no equipment purchase required, and simple operations for users to earn income daily. Users can earn a $15 bonus upon registration and earn $0.6 daily by signing in. By choosing a suitable mining contract, users can start earning passive income from their cryptocurrencies. A variety of contracts are available to cater to different needs, with potential returns and costs to consider. New users can invest in the "New User Experience Contract" to potentially earn income. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: XRP, DOGE holders switch to APTMiner for passive income; Sign-up bonus $15, earn $0.6 daily. No equipment needed.

news.summary: Arthur Hayes, the founder of BitMEX, is optimistic about Ethereum's potential for growth in the current year after a significant increase in its price. He believes that Ethereum has a promising outlook due to various factors. Hayes forecasts a substantial increase in Ethereum's value and encourages investors to consider its potential for profitable returns in the near future.
news.headline: Ethereum price could double this year, says BitMEX founder Arthur Hayes, following recent surge.

news.summary: The use of card-linked stablecoin payments has significantly increased in business-to-business transactions, with a notable rise in the adoption of Tether's USDt. This stablecoin has emerged as the dominant choice in the market, showcasing a strong presence in the industry. This trend signifies a growing preference for digital payment solutions, with a clear indication of an upsurge in the numbers of transactions and payments conducted through this method.
news.headline: Stablecoin payments hit $94B, driven by B2B transfers. USDt dominates, with growth in card-linked transactions.

news.summary: In an effort to enhance Costa Rica's education sector, an international mission focused on export promotion and foreign direct investment is underway. Taking place in SAN DIEGO, Calif., the initiative aims to position Costa Rica as a prominent international academic hub. This mission, initiated on May 29, 2025, underscores the importance of fostering growth in the education sector through strategic partnerships and investments. Key goals include attracting foreign investments and promoting educational exports to boost the country's development. The detailed strategy encompasses leveraging Costa Rica's academic capabilities to attract more students and professionals globally, ultimately contributing to the country's economic growth.
news.headline: PROCOMER promotes Costa Rican education sector at NAFSA 2025 in San Diego, aiming to attract foreign investment.

news.summary: In Tallahassee, Florida, on May 29, 2025, the Board of Directors of Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per share on its common stock. This dividend equates to an annualized rate of $0.96 per common share. Shareholders of record as of June 9, 2025, will receive the payout on June 23, 2025. Based on a closing stock price of $38.06 on May 28, 2025, the annualized dividend yield is calculated at 2.52%.
news.headline: Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) declares $0.24 per share quarterly cash dividend, yielding 2.52%, payable on June 23, 2025.

news.summary: In today's report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.9%, with a total of 10.8 million individuals currently jobless. Additionally, the national GDP saw a decline of 4.3% in the last quarter, marking a significant economic downturn. Experts attribute these concerning figures to various factors, including the ongoing global pandemic and its impact on businesses and employment opportunities. The government is implementing measures to address these challenges and stimulate economic recovery, but the road ahead remains uncertain. Amidst these circumstances, it is crucial for authorities to prioritize support for individuals and industries most affected by the current crisis.
news.headline: Appellate ruling keeps Trump tariffs in place; no immediate changes.

news.summary: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones experienced a substantial increase of over 700 points. Notably, investor Cathie Wood made the decision to sell a particular stock just before a significant rise. The stock market saw a robust performance, with the Nasdaq outshining the day's trading activities. Additionally, a health stock witnessed a substantial surge following news of a rejected deal. Live coverage of these market developments can be found without specifying the source.
news.headline: Dow Jones up over 700 points, Nasdaq leads, health stock soars after rejected deal news. Wood sells stock.

news.summary: According to court documents, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Binance have reached an agreement to end their two-year legal dispute.
news.headline: Binance lawsuit dismissed by SEC after a two-year legal battle, according to court documents.

news.summary: LGI Homes has officially launched Cheyenne Valley, a new community featuring 144 lots situated in North Las Vegas, Nevada.
news.headline: LGI Homes opens new community, Cheyenne Valley, in North Las Vegas with 144 lots.

RSF: ‘Our forces consolidated their ongoing field victories, continued their advance toward the strongholds of the terrorist Islamic Movement, and achieved a new victory by liberating the areas of Al-Hamadi and Kazgil, south of the strategically important city of Al-Obeid. This

news.summary: Retail giant Gap, Inc. (NYSE: GAP) disclosed its first-quarter financial results following Thursday's market close. The report showcased earnings of 51 cents per share for the quarter, surpassing the projected 45 cents by a noticeable margin. The company's quarterly revenue stood at $3.46 billion, exceeding the anticipated $3.42 billion. Store sales for the period remained unchanged from the previous year. As of the close of the quarter, Gap operated roughly 3,500 store outlets across 35 nations, with 2,496 being under direct company control. Further details and the full report are accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Gap stock plunges after Q1 results, warns tariffs could dent FY25 revenue by $150 million. Quarterly revenue beat estimates at $3.46 billion, earning 51 cents per share. Store sales flat compared to last year. Company has 3,500 stores in 35 countries.

news.summary: Boston-based BXP, the leading developer, owner, and manager of premium workplaces in the US, revealed that top executives Owen Thomas, Douglas Linde, and Michael LaBelle will partake in and present at Nareit’s 2025 REITweek Investor Conference from June 3-5, 2025 at the New York Hilton Midtown in New York City. The presentation from BXP, listed on NYSE as BXP, is set to commence around that time.
news.headline: BXP to present at Nareit’s 2025 REITweek Investor Conference with top executives, expecting to take place on June 3-5, 2025 in NYC.

news.summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) disclosed that its subsidiary, Ventas Realty, Limited Partnership, has successfully priced a public offering of $500 million in 5.100% Senior Notes due 2032 at an issue price of 99.391% of the principal amount. These Notes, which are senior unsecured obligations of Ventas Realty, will come with a full and unconditional guarantee.
news.headline: Ventas priced $500M senior notes offering at 5.100% due 2032, with an issue price at 99.391% of principal amount.
COLOMBIA INVESTMENT IN HYDROCARBONS EXPLORATION AND PRODUCTION COULD INCREASE 8% IN 2025 TO $4.68 BLN, INDUSTRY GROUP SAYS

news.summary: A number of organizations are progressing in the development of treatments for anal cancer. Some of these companies include Merck with their drug Keytruda, BioMimetix with BMX-001, Novartis with KFA115, and Bicara Therapeutics with BCA101, among others. The focus is on utilizing immunotherapy and targeted therapies which are gaining momentum in the field. This progress is intensifying competition in the market, with the aim of enhancing the effectiveness of these treatments.
news.headline: Anal cancer market growing with new treatments like Zynzy approved; Key players include Merck, BioMimetix, and Novartis. Efficacy competition rising.
LanzaTech makes progress with leadership shifts and cost-cutting measures to drive transformation.

news.summary: MediPharm Labs has addressed accusations made by dissident shareholder Apollo, branding them as deliberately false or misleading in an effort to spread misinformation. The company stands by its record and refutes claims made by Apollo. This response comes in the midst of a dispute where Apollo has targeted MediPharm Labs with unsubstantiated allegations. These claims are seen by MediPharm Labs as an attempt to damage their reputation. The company remains steadfast in their denial of any wrongdoing, emphasizing its commitment to transparency and accountability.
news.headline: MediPharm Labs refutes fabricated claims by shareholder Apollo, part of misinformation campaign.

news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on May 29, 2025, Titan Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: TACHU) disclosed that holders of the 27,600,000 units from its initial public offering (which included 3,600,000 units from the underwriters' overallotment option) completed on April 10, 2025, now have the option to separately trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units starting on June 2, 2025. Any units not separated will keep trading on The Nasdaq Global Market under "TACHU," while the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will trade separately under "TACH" and "TACHW" symbols. Upon separation, only whole warrants will be traded as no fractional warrants will be issued. Holders must contact Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company, the Company's transfer agent, to carry out the separation process.
news.headline: Titan Acquisition Corp will start trading its Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately from June 2, 2025, following their IPO of 27.6M units, including 3.6M overallotment units, will be tradable under symbols "TACH" and "TACHW." Holders need to inform brokers to separate units.

news.summary: Today, a California-based company, Sollus Health, known for its pioneering non-invasive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation "TMS" treatment, revealed the addition of Amy Stickler to its Advisory Board. Amy Stickler, previously Director of Global Strategic Initiatives at Google, brings her expertise to the board, with her appointment becoming effective this May. This move signifies a strategic step for Sollus Health, strengthening its leadership team and potentially leveraging Stickler's insights gained during her tenure at Google. Stickler's appointment highlights Sollus Health's commitment to growth and innovation in the field of TMS therapy.
news.headline: Sollus Health appoints Google executive Amy Stickler to Advisory Board; specializing in TMS treatment in California.

news.summary: In Toronto, the Ford government and Education Minister Paul Calandra unveiled the Supporting Children and Students Act, 2025, to facilitate provincial takeover of local school boards and require School Resource Officers (SROs) in schools. The Ontario School Board Council of Unions (OSBCU) expressed concern, stating the legislation fails to tackle Ontario education's core issues. The act raises alarm by mandating SROs and granting increased control to the province, sparking debate over its impact. OSBCU stresses the need for addressing the underlying challenges facing education in Ontario beyond surface-level changes proposed in the new legislation.
news.headline: OSBCU criticizes new education legislation in Ontario for adding police in schools while overlooking underlying issues.
TURKISH FOREIGN MINISTER DISCUSSES CEASEFIRE EFFORTS IN CALL WITH HAMAS POLITICAL BUREAU MEMBERS, TURKISH DIPLOMATIC SOURCE SAYS

news.summary: Before the end of May 2025, Teamsters, along with other members of the Labor Alliance for Public Transit, gathered at Union Station in Chicago to call for legislative action in Illinois. The union coalition emphasized the need for state legislators to enhance the public transit system. The urgency of this demand is underscored by the approaching deadline, highlighting the importance of swift action.
news.headline: Illinois Teamsters and allies call on lawmakers to prevent cuts to public transportation before the month ends.
